home.folderDragHint: Long-press a folder to delete. Drag the grip on the left to reorder.
home.folderDragHintSelect: Tap the checkbox or row to select items, then tap Delete at the bottom. Cancel to exit. Reorder: use the grip lines.
home.folderLimitWarning: Folder limit reached. Go Premium for unlimited folders.

folder.zikirDragHint: Long-press a row to delete. Drag the grip on the left to reorder.
folder.zikirDragHintSelect: Tap the checkbox or row to select items, then tap Delete at the bottom. Cancel to exit. Reorder: use the grip lines.
folder.zikirDragHintSelectNoReorder: Tap the checkbox or row to select items, then tap Delete at the bottom. Cancel to exit. Reordering is off while search or favorites filter is on.
folder.zikirDragHintReorderDisabled: Clear search and turn off the favorites filter to reorder.
folder.seasonalDragHint: These special-day dhikr appear only for the scheduled period.
folder.limitWarning: This folder has reached the zikir limit. Delete one or move to another folder.

library.title: Zikir library
library.intro: Duas and repetitive dhikr for daily situations. Search covers name, meaning, when to recite, and keywords.
library.searchPlaceholder: Name, meaning, or context (e.g. toilet, travel, sleep)…
library.premiumMore: Premium with +{count} more duas and dhikr

quran.title: Qur'an
quran.searchPlaceholder: Surah name, Al-Baqarah 12, translation or transliteration…
quran.searchGuideIntro: This box filters the surah list; suggestions appear as you type and you can jump straight to a verse.
quran.searchGuideRef: Surah reference: Al-Baqarah 12, 2:12, or a surah name (Al-Fatihah, Yasin).
quran.searchGuideFilter: Typing a surah name narrows the list; close matches work even without an exact name.
quran.searchGuideMeal: Translation text: searches Sahih International; e.g. no doubt, or Al-Baqarah guidance.
quran.searchGuideTranslit: English transliteration: e.g. la rayba fih, bismillah, al-kitabu; minor typos and hyphen variants are tolerated.
quran.searchGuideTips: At least 3 characters are required. Surah name + word (e.g. kahf guidance) narrows results. Press Enter when there is a single suggestion.
quran.searchIndexError: Search index could not load. Restart the app or install the latest version.
quran.loadError: Could not load surah. Please try again.
quran.guideToggleAria: Open or close Qur'an usage guide
quran.guideOpenLibrary: From Discover → Surahs open the Qur'an; search surahs or check the Favorites tab.
quran.guideReadSurah: Open a surah to read verses; juz boundaries are shown in the list.
quran.guideMealSelect: Pick a translation at the top ({meals}).
quran.guideReadMode: Change display here: translation + Arabic, transliteration + Arabic, or Arabic only.
quran.guideReaderLayout: In Quran layout, choose the ayah list or mushaf page view.
quran.guideGoto: Jump to a verse by entering surah and verse numbers.
quran.guideTapExpand: Tap a verse briefly to read it enlarged; swipe right for the next verse, left for the previous.
quran.guideHoldTafsir: Press and hold a verse to open Turkish tafsir in an external site.
quran.guideFavorite: Tap the star on a verse card to favorite it; open again from the Favorites tab.
quran.guideAddFolder: Use Add to zikir folder to save verses; you can enter up to three verse numbers.
quran.guideCounterLayout: Choose save layout and counter style: classic, compact, or verse only.
quran.gotoInvalidSurah: Enter a valid surah number or name.
quran.gotoAmbiguousSurah: Multiple surahs matched; use a number or a more specific name.
quran.gotoInvalidAyah: Enter a verse number between 1 and {max} for this surah.
quran.readModeTranslitArDesc: No translation; English Latin transliteration under Arabic
quran.readerLayoutMushafDesc: 604 pages; scroll vertically, swipe right to turn
quran.favoritesEmpty: No favorite verses yet. Tap the star on a verse card while reading to add one.
quran.ayahExpandSwipeHint: Swipe left or right for the previous or next verse
quran.tafsirBridgeHint: Choose a source to open Turkish tafsir for this verse.
quran.folderAddAyahsHint: Only the verse numbers you type are added (not a range).
quran.folderAddCounterClassicDesc: Scroll to read verses, large counter
quran.folderAddNeedAyah: Enter at least one verse number.
quran.folderAddMaxAyahs: You can add at most 3 verses.

settings.title: Settings
settings.wakeFootnote: Keep awake works on the counter screen. May not work on very old devices.

reminderDialog.notificationPermDeniedNative: Daily reminders need notification permission. On Android: App info → Notifications.
reminderDialog.exactAlarmBody:
To run the reminder at the exact time you chose, allow exact alarms.

Tap below to open the relevant settings screen.
reminderDialog.scheduleFailedBody: Could not schedule the daily reminder. Update the app and try again; if it persists, check Settings → Notifications.
reminderDialog.unsupportedBody: This browser or view does not support notifications.
reminderDialog.deniedWebBody: Notifications are blocked. Allow notifications for this app in your phone or browser settings to use reminders.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.storageText: This app stores your folders, zikir entries, and counter history on your device (local storage). By default it does not send data externally.
privacy.statsText: Daily tap records are kept on your device; charts show the last 7 days.
privacy.backupText: Data currently lives only on this device. Clearing browser or app data, switching devices, or uninstalling may delete all records; we recommend backing up important data.
privacy.permissionsText: Options such as vibration, sound, and keep screen awake are only for the in-app experience and are optional.
privacy.billingText: Payments are processed entirely by Google Play; the app never accesses your card or payment details. To verify subscription status, purchase info (product ID, transaction state, an anonymous user ID) is shared with the subscription service RevenueCat.

premium.title: Premium
premium.teaserDefault: We're working on Premium. You'll see new things here soon.
premium.teaser0: Premium will unlock trash (restore) and a larger library.
premium.teaser1: Coming soon: restore deleted zikir and more library content with Premium.
premium.teaser3: When Premium launches, trash and the expanded library will be active here.
premium.cardBackupText: Take everything with you when you change devices.
premium.cardStatsText: See your progress toward goals clearly and stay motivated.
premium.cardWeeklyText: A short Monday summary: time, goals, and trends.
premium.cardWeeklyBullet1: Monday notification: busiest day, total time, hours in the app.
premium.cardWeeklyBullet2: Set a daily goal: see how many days you hit it in the weekly report.
premium.cardWeeklyBullet3: Daily average time and % change vs last week (+/−).
premium.cardThemeText: An interface that feels more like yours.
premium.cardRemindersText: Gentle nudges that match your rhythm.
premium.cardTrashText: Restore accidentally deleted zikir with Premium.
premium.cardLibraryText: More dhikr and duas in the library with Premium.
premium.note: Premium features will unlock automatically when active.
premium.trashLockedAlert: Trash will be available with Premium.
premium.hubSectionDesc: Tap a feature to open its settings screen.
premium.hubLeadLocked: Manage Premium features here; subscribe to unlock them all.
premium.counterCustomizeNavDesc: Ring, numbers, visibility and tap area
premium.counterCustomizeLead: The counter screen above is a live preview; edit below.
premium.counterBgNavDesc: Preset image or pick from gallery
premium.counterBgLead: Choose the image behind the counter card.
premium.counterBgGallerySoon: Gallery pick will be available soon.
premium.counterBgGalleryError: Couldn't open that photo. Try another image.
premium.editorPlaceholder: Editing options will appear here soon.

premiumUpsell.title: Premium
premiumUpsell.folderMessage: For more folders, please purchase a Premium subscription.
premiumUpsell.zikirMessage: To add more zikir, please purchase a Premium subscription.
premiumUpsell.libraryMessage: To access more duas and dhikr in the library, please purchase Premium.
premiumUpsell.featureMessage: This feature is available with a Premium subscription.

premiumPurchase.title: Premium Subscription
premiumPurchase.lead: Unlimited folders and zikir, trash restore, expanded library, and more.
premiumPurchase.restoreSuccess: Your Premium subscription has been restored.
premiumPurchase.restoreNothing: No active subscription was found for this account.
premiumPurchase.restoreUnavailable: Restore is not available yet. It will work when Play Store billing is connected.
premiumPurchase.stubNote: This screen will activate when Play Store billing is connected.
premiumPurchase.purchaseSuccess: Your premium subscription is active. Thank you!
premiumPurchase.purchasePending: Your payment is awaiting confirmation. Premium will unlock automatically once confirmed.
premiumPurchase.purchaseError: The purchase could not be completed. Please try again.
premiumPurchase.autoRenewNote: Your subscription renews automatically at the end of each period. You can cancel anytime in Google Play → Subscriptions; access continues until the end of the current period.

weeklyReport.goalHint: 0 = off. Total dhikr across all folders per day.
weeklyReport.permDenied: Notification permission is required for the weekly report.

smartReminders.lead: Create alarm-style reminders with your own text and schedule.
smartReminders.empty: No reminders yet. Tap + to add one.
smartReminders.messagesHint: If you add several, a random one is sent each time.
smartReminders.countHint: Notifications are spread evenly in this range (up to 3).
smartReminders.needMessage: Enter at least one notification message.
smartReminders.maxReached: You can add up to {max} reminders.
smartReminders.permDenied: Notification permission denied. Reminders will not work.
smartReminders.previewNote: Preview mode: you can add and edit reminders; notifications are sent with Premium.
smartReminders.sampleMessage: And remember your Lord within yourself in humility and in fear without being apparent in speech - in the mornings and the evenings. And do not be among the heedless.

trash.title: Trash
trash.hint: Restore accidentally deleted zikir. Empty the trash to delete permanently.
trash.deletePermanentConfirm: Delete this item from trash permanently? This cannot be undone.

zikir.copyTitle: Copy or move to another folder
zikir.name: Zikir name
zikir.virtuePlaceholder: For Esma names, leave blank to use the app's suggested default text.

confirm.deleteZikirsMsg: Permanently delete {count} selected zikir? History for these zikir will be cleared. This cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteFoldersMsg: Permanently delete {folderCount} folders and {zikirCount} zikir inside them? This cannot be undone.
confirm.protectedFoldersMsg: “Default dhikr” and “Beautiful Names of Allah” folders cannot be deleted. Deselect them.
confirm.protectedSeasonalZikirsMsg: Special-day dhikr cannot be deleted. They disappear when the period ends.
confirm.folderLimitMsg: You can create up to {max} folders. Premium unlocks unlimited folders.
confirm.destFolderFullMsg: Destination folder is full (max {max} zikir). Premium unlocks unlimited zikir per folder.

cloudBackup.lead: Back up your dhikr, settings, and history securely with your Google account.
cloudBackup.connectHint: When you sign in with Google, your data is backed up securely. The first backup runs automatically; after that it updates once a week.
cloudBackup.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect your Google account? Your cloud backup will not be deleted.
cloudBackup.restoreConfirm: The cloud backup will replace data on this device. Current dhikr and settings will be overwritten. Continue?
cloudBackup.unavailable: Cloud backup is only available in the Android app.
cloudBackup.notConfigured: Cloud backup is not configured yet.
cloudBackup.premiumRequired: Cloud backup is included with Premium.
cloudBackup.errorSignIn: Could not sign in with Google. Try again.
cloudBackup.errorBackup: Backup failed. Check your internet connection.
cloudBackup.errorNotFound: No cloud backup found. Back up from this device first.
cloudBackup.autoBackupNote: Automatic backup runs once a week while the app is open.

zikirMeaning.z_1: Glory be to Allah; He is free from all imperfections.
zikirMeaning.z_4: There is no god but Allah.
